## [03:01 - 05:46]

So that's the trigger event and so then what we do is you send them a series of emails inviting them to complete their purchase now We want to be somewhat delicate in the way we handle this so One of the traditions is to say did you forget to check out? Did you forget something personally? I think that's a little bit Faults because people don't put a $2,000 item in their shopping cart and forget to check out They may have gotten distracted, but they don't forget But other communications like there's still time This is your last chance those kinds of terms Can then draw someone in to invite them to reconsider now one of the ways that Is sometimes used is to offer a discount To people who put your item in the shopping cart, but didn't finish checking out the rationale here is That reason that enticement Could be a price discount. I actually recommend you don't do that So it works for some low-dollar e-commerce sites who want to bring people back to buy a bunch of things But hey, the positioning isn't really good if you're trying to be an expert and sell a high-end product to Discount it feels desperate if you're going to give them a discount because they put something in your cart and then they didn't actually check out Now Doing this strategy can give you really great results. I oftentimes find that 15 5 to 15% of abandoned carts finished buying with a good abandoned cart strategy and in it in any Shopping cart situation. There is a fairly large percentage of carts that get abandoned and so this is a great way to just especially with high dollar sales to just earn Some extra money because hey each additional thousand to two thousand dollar sell helps and if you can put together an abandoned cart strategy That delivers five to ten more cells. Hey, that's five to ten thousand twenty thousand dollars depending on what your price is Of your item and as I said this strategy once you get it set up You can oftentimes use it for everything you sell into the future And so one small expenditure of some time and maybe some money to get somebody to do the technical part to set it up for you Can have lasting results that can actually put fairly nice dollars on your bottom line
